data.title: Bank of England Reduces Interest Rates by 25 Basis Points
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Bank of England has lowered its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points, reducing it from 4.25% to 4%. This marks the fifth rate cut in the current cycle, aligning with market expectations.

data.title: Coinbase and Indian Minister Explore Blockchain Push — What It Means for SHIB
data.description:
Summary: Why is Coinbase’s meeting with Karnataka’s IT Minister significant? The meeting spotlights increasing government interest in using blockchain technology for digital governance and public services. It shows a move from viewing blockchain as just an investment to seeing it as important infrastructure. This signals growing adoption of blockchain in real-world applications and potential collaboration opportunities. 🎧 Listen to This Article Prefer to listen? Hit play below to hear the narrated version
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/07/coinbase-and-indian-minister-explore-blockchain-push-what-it-means-for-shib/

data.title: Buterin Urges Faster Ethereum Withdrawals — Could This Boost Shibarium Too?
data.description:
Summary: Why does Vitalik Buterin want Ethereum Layer 2 withdrawals to be faster? Buterin believes waiting days to withdraw from Layer 2s is too long and hurts user experience. He says quicker withdrawals would reduce reliance on insecure bridging solutions and lower the cost of capital. Faster, trustless exits would help Ethereum Layer 1 remain the core of its economic ecosystem. 🎧 Listen to This Article Prefer to listen? Hit play below to hear the narrated version
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/07/buterin-urges-faster-ethereum-withdrawals-could-this-boost-shibarium-too/

data.title: 256 ETH Stolen in AI Scam Hijacking YouTube Channels for Crypto Theft
data.description:
Summary: How are scammers using YouTube to steal crypto? Scammers hijack old, trusted YouTube channels to promote fake trading bots with hidden smart contracts that drain funds. Victims are tricked into deploying these contracts and sending crypto, losing thousands.   🎧 Listen to This Article Prefer to listen? Hit play below to hear the narrated version. Cybersecurity company SentinelLABS has issued a report revealing that cybercriminals are exploiting long-established, credible-seeming crypto YouTube channels to advertise a fraudulent trading bot embedded with a malicious smart contract that drains users’ funds
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/07/256-eth-stolen-in-ai-scam-hijacking-youtube-channels-for-crypto-theft/

data.description:
Key points: 🎧 Listen to This Article Prefer to listen? Hit play below to hear the narrated version. If you thought cryptocurrencies were just for buying the latest meme coin or holding as a long-term investment, think again. Spending crypto is quickly becoming a real thing. source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/07/spending-crypto-what-you-can-actually-pay-for-with-digital-currency/

data.title: Ant Group to Launch Proprietary Blockchain by September 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Ant Group's Vice President and President of Ant Digital's blockchain business, Bian Zhuoqun, announced plans to launch a proprietary public blockchain by the end of September 2025. This blockchain will be capable of handling real transactions. Earlier this year, on April 30, Ant Digital introduced the Layer2 blockchain Jovay, emphasizing its status as a compliant, institution-grade blockchain without issuing any tokens. Bian Zhuoqun stated that Ant Digital aims to serve as a bridge between Web2 and Web3, providing more trusted assets for Web3 and introducing more compliant funds into Web2. She cited data predicting that the global tokenization market could reach $16 trillion by 2030. Currently, Ant Digital is expanding its RWA asset footprint in sectors such as renewable energy, computing power, and finance.

data.title: Dogecoin Doomed To Chop? Analyst Sees $0.90–$1.50 Top—But Not Anytime Soon
data.description:
Dogecoin has now entered the longest period below its all-time high in its history—over 1,550 days and counting—with crypto analyst VisionPulsed warning that while a breakout may eventually come, the asset remains locked in what he calls a “bearish forever” pattern. In his August 6 video update, VisionPulsed provided a sobering macro-to-micro analysis of Dogecoin’s price action, underscoring the asset’s historic underperformance compared to other large-cap cryptocurrencies. “We’re now setting a Guinness World Record for most days below the all-time high for Dogecoin,” he remarked. “First cycle was 1,200 days, second cycle was 1,126
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-doomed-to-chop/

data.title: SEC Exempts Lido and Jito From Securities Laws in Major Win for Liquid Staking Protocols
data.description:
Key Takeaways:The U. S. SEC has officially exempted non-custodial liquid staking protocols like Lido (Ethereum) and Jito (Solana) from securities regulations. This sets a regulatory precedent for decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols offering non-custodial staking services
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27991106784425?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS
